title: FIGS Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: FIGS Q3 2024 net revenue declined 2% to $140.2 million, missing expectations. Company reported net loss of $1.7 million with diluted EPS of -$0.01. Adjusted EBITDA dropped significantly to $4.8 million (3.4% margin) from prior year's 17.2%. Active customers grew 4% to 2.7 million. Average Order Value decreased 5% to $108. Gross margin contracted 130 basis points to 67.1%. Inventory declined 14% YoY to $123.4 million. Free cash flow reached $18.4 million. Company successfully transitioned fulfillment center to Arizona, expected to increase flexibility and support scaling toward $1B+ revenue. FIGS operates in 33 countries with further growth planned in Asia, particularly Japan. Management highlighted standardized fit and improved fit tools launching next year. Olympics campaign generated over 1 billion earned media impressions. Management acknowledged controllable issues such as footwear inventory and pricing impacted results. Full-year 2024 guidance adjusted to negative 1% to flat growth.
